description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a stylized cat with a large, round head and small, rounded ears. Its body is covered in a soft pink fabric adorned with intricate patterns featuring skulls, gears, and floral motifs in darker pink and white. The face is characterized by large, circular white eyes, a small pink nose, and a subtle smiling mouth, with a white facial area contrasting the patterned pink. A red heart is visible on its chest, adding a touch of warmth and charm. The toy has a curled tail, four stubby legs with white and gray paw details, and appears to be filled with a soft, squeezable material. The overall appearance is whimsical and friendly, making it appealing for children and collectors alike.
description: A pink patterned plush cat with a large round head, white face, and a red heart on its chest. It features circular eyes, a curled tail, and soft, squeezable limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's white face, large circular eyes, pink nose, smiling mouth, and a red heart on its chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curled tail, side of the head, and the patterned pink fabric with visible paw details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and tail, with the pink patterned fabric fully visible and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the curled tail, side of the head, and the patterned pink fabric, with the right paw and part of the face visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon cat with pink patterned fur
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and cheerful, with large circular eyes, a small pink nose, and a subtle smiling mouth. The absence of eyebrows or eyelids gives it a simple, inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its front legs forward, hind legs spread to the sides, and tail curled around the body.
